description: Seed-42 LOO predictions are not retrained for multi-seed validation; they are hardlinked from the canonical Phase 6B output (results/zero_day_loo/predictions/) to keep the directory layout uniform across seeds without disk duplication. The fusion driver (multi_seed_fusion.py) verifies seed-42 reproduces entropy_benign_p95 strict_avg = 0.8035264623662012 exactly.
